svg.title: College Admission Assistant — UML Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: A UML-style architecture diagram showing the modular RAG pipeline from user input through 6 stages to evaluation output, with GOF design patterns and SOLID principles noted.

g.text: GOF Template Method — Steel Thread RAGPipeline
core/loader.py · GOF Factory Method · Docling + PyPDFLoader
core/prompts.py + llm_handler.py · GOF Singleton · Groq LLM
